title: Every Breath You Take
meaning_summary: Every Breath You Take keeps earning because its instantly recognizable melody, massive radio memory, and repeated media reuse make it one of the clearest long-tail catalog earners in rock.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming and radio familiarity sustain continuous replay.
Sync, interpolation, and media reuse materially extend earnings.
Strong global recognition keeps the song active across generations.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate reflects evergreen streaming, classic radio memory, sync demand, and the song's especially strong songwriter-side value.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer-side value is materially tied to Sting's authorship
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is a modeled gross-to-net range, not a public royalty statement.
